title: AlphaPo - REKT
relevance_summary: Phishing attack leading to hot wallet drain by Lazarus group

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from a known compromised hot wallet address.

red_flags: Large transfers from known compromised hot wallet addresses
summary: AlphaPo, a crypto payments processor, lost $60M due to a phishing attack by Lazarus group. A hot wallet was drained, funds were consolidated, and dispersed. A guard could have blocked transactions from known compromised hot wallet addresses.
